title: Giant's Clash Client
description: Official Custom Client to enhance the Giant's Clash experience. Curated by CorgiDogMC and Sl1myz
body:
# ⚔️ **Giant's Clash**

Official Client modpack to enhance the player experience for Giant's Clash by Team D Minecraft server. This pack offers a direct **PLAY** button to the server and various channels to connect with other players.

💬 Official Discord: <https://discord.gg/q7be5Tj5XV>
🔗 Learn more: <https://giantsclash.net/>

This modpack includes performance optimizations, quality-of-life improvements, and Discord RPC integration for the Giant's Clash server experience.

Curated by CorgiDogMC and Sl1myz

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
Complementary Shaders: https://www.complementary.dev/
